---
title: "PLACES data cleaning"
author: "Haylee Oyler"
format: html
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(sf)
library(tmap)

places_raw <- st_read(here("data", "PLACES_tracts.geojson")) %>% 
  clean_names()
```

```{r}
table(places_raw$category)

view(places_raw)

places <- places_raw %>% 
  # Drop unneeded columns
  select(-c(geolocation, statefp, countyfp, tractce, geoidfq, name, namelsad, mtfcc, funcstat))


```
